memberdef.argsstring: (String user, String hash_password, int UID, DataBaseConnection db, boolean reminder, int hour, int minute, MainActivity mainActivity)
memberdef.name: User

memberdef.argsstring: (String user, int UID, DataBaseConnection db, boolean reminder, int hour, int minute, MainActivity mainActivity)
memberdef.name: User

detaileddescription.para: Returns the current minute value.
Sets the minute value.
Returns the current hour.
Sets the hour value.
Checks if a reminder is set.
Sets the reminder flag to the specified value.
Sets the unique identifier (UID) of the object.
Returns the current user.
Returns the hashed password.
Returns the list of books.
Adds a book to the list if it is not already present.
Removes a book from both the local list and the user interface.

Iterates through the local book list to find and remove the specified book. Updates the UI by removing the corresponding visual representation of the book. If the book is marked as being in the database, attempts to remove it from there as well. Handles exceptions that may occur during database operations and provides user feedback.

parameterdescription.para: the Book object representing the book to be removed
the Context object for UI operations
the RecyclerView container where the book's visual part is located

detaileddescription.para: Retrieves a set of authors from the list of books.
Retrieves a set of genres from the list of books.
Returns the unique identifier (UID).
Returns the list of goals.
Adds a goal to the list and returns its ID.
Returns the list of completed goals.
Sets the user name.
Returns the list of failed goals.
